titleStmt.title: Transcription and Translation of NRS GD55/32

respStmt.resp: Exported from Models of Authority data
respStmt.name: tei_exporter

availability.p: Status unknown. Exported for research and migration workflows.

revisionDesc.change: transcription moa=290 status=live modified=2021-07-20 11:52:24.465795+00 | translation moa=291 status=live modified=2021-04-06 10:06:03.155095+00

div.p:
Dunekanus filius Gilleberti filii Fergus . Comes de Karic  Omnibus probis hominibus Regni Scotie  Clericis . et Laicis .
Salutem . Sciant tam posteri quam presentes  me concessisse et dedisse . et hac mea Carta confirmasse deo . et ecclesie
de Melros . et monachis ibidem deo seruientibus . totam donationem . quam ego . et Roger de Scalebroc miles meus eis
concessimus . et dedimus . scilicet totam terram de Drumentheisuiene et de Aleburc . et de Althefur . per easdem diuisas que
in Carta ipsius Rogeri continentur . cum Omnibus aisiamentis eiusdem terre . in liberam . et puram . et perpetuam elemosinam .
ita libere . et quiete . plenarie . et honorifice sicut aliqua elemosina in toto ordine cisterciensi liberius . quietius . et tenetur . et possidetur .
et prout carta eiusdem rogeri melius protestatur . saluo seruicio domini Regis . de me . et Rogero . et heredibus nostris . Quare volo
firmiterque precipio . vt pretaxata . ecclesia . de Melros . [ms. de Melros . ecclesia . marked for transposition] et eiusdem loci monachi pretaxati hanc donationem de me
et rogero de Scalebroc milite meo . et heredibus nostris eis concessam . datam . et hac Carta mea confirmatam . ita libere
et quiete . et honorificentie . habeant . teneant . et imperpetuum possideant  prout aliquis Comes . uel alicuius feoudi aliquis
aduocatus  liberius . quietius . honorificentius alicui matri ecclesie conuentuali  concedere . dare . confirmare . et potuerit . et
debuerit . His Testibus  Iocelino Episcopo Glasgcuensi . et Ecclesia Glascuensi . Comite DunecaN . et
Malcholmo filio eius . et herede . Comite Gilleberto . W’ . Alano Dapifero domini Regis . Willelmo de Morevilla . Con
stabulario domini Regis . Gillecrist Mecachin . Ewine Macalewin . Iohanne filio Willelmi . Retheri . Mecmac
charil . Edgaro Macmurthari Camerario meo . Gillebride . Macmehin . Achostduf . et Can fratre suo ;

Duncan son of Gilbert son of Fergus, Earl of Carrick, to all worthy men of the kingdom of Scotland, clerk and lay, Greeting: Let those as well future as present know that I have granted and given, and by this my charter made firm, to God and to the church of Melrose and to the monks there serving God, the whole donation that I and Roger of Skelbrooke my knight have granted and given to them, that is, the whole land of Drumentheisuiene and of Aleburc, and of Althefur, by the same boundaries that are described in the charter of Roger himself, with all easements of the same land, in free and pure and perpetual alms, as freely and quietly, fully and honourably, as any alms in the whole Cistercian Order is freely (and) quietly both held and possessed, and as the charter of the same Roger well bears witness, reserving the service of the lord king from me and Roger and our heirs. Wherefore I will and firmly enjoin that the aforenamed church of Melrose, and the aforenamed monks of the same place, should have and hold this donation, and possess in perpetuity, of me and Roger of Skelbrooke my knight, and our heirs, as granted, given, and made firm to them by this my charter, as freely and quietly and honourably as any earl or any patron of any feu both might be able and ought to grant, give, and confirm to any conventual mother church. With these witnesses, Jocelin bishop of Glasgow, and the Church of Glasgow, Earl Duncan and Malcolm his son and heir, Earl Gilbert, W., Alan the steward of the lord king, William de Morville the constable of the lord king, Gilchrist mac Eachann, Ewen mac Alwine, John son of William, Rether mac Coirill, Edgar mac Murthar my chamberlain, Gilla Brigte mac Mehin, Achostduf, and Cane his brother.
